description: Extend ManageEngine OpManager's core asset taxonomy by creating three specialized maritime device categories and uploading custom icons for them. A specification document and the icon files are located on your desktop in ~/Desktop/maritime_taxonomy/. Read taxonomy_spec.txt, then navigate to Settings > Configuration > Device Categories in OpManager (http://localhost:8060, credentials: admin/Admin@123). Create the categories, assign their parent types correctly, and upload the corresponding PNG icon for each as specified.
